description: This file defines negative question formation in the Going-to Future construction in Njo Viri (Balanda). These questions ask whether a planned or intended future action will not take place.

general_principle.statement: Going-to future negative questions in Balanda are formed by keeping the negative going-to structure unchanged and adding the question marker 'we?' at the end of the sentence.

willa_pattern.structure: Subject + willa + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement) + we?

ma_gba_pattern.structure: Subject + ma + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement) + gba + we?

shared_constraints: The connector 'va' must link to the final base verb
The final verb must remain in base form
The question marker 'we?' must be sentence-final
Do not use 'ti-' on the final verb

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va ja se we?
english: Am I not going to eat fish?

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va nzü ngo we?
english: Is she not going to drink water?

balanda: Danda ma tiyai va teli muru famvara gba we?
english: Are we not going to sleep on the bed?

balanda: Uku willa tiyai va yai we?
english: Is Uku not going to go?

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va dhii ba gba we?
english: Is Ngande not going to come home?

balanda: Ndi willa tiyai va nonö gbi difo we?
english: Are they not going to walk in the compound?

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va nangele zanga we?
english: Is she not going to run fast?

balanda: Uku ma tiyai va mande gbi njü gba we?
english: Is Uku not going to work in the garden?

balanda: Wiki willa tiyai va moliki gbi difo we?
english: Is the child not going to play in the compound?

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va loro voro gba we?
english: Am I not going to watch the dog?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va vele njo balanda we?
english: Am I not going to speak Balanda?

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va sudi kavoso gba we?
english: Is the girl not going to write words?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va dheke kitabu we?
english: Am I not going to read a book?

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va teri ay gba we?
english: Is he not going to think about it?

balanda: Ndi willa tiyai va ŋiyi ay we?
english: Are they not going to know it?

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va we ndi gba we?
english: Am I not going to ask them?

balanda: Ngande willa tiyai va vele zi ndi we?
english: Is Ngande not going to tell them?

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va keye ti naa ni gba we?
english: Is the girl not going to call her mother?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va merego ŋo we?
english: Am I not going to love you?

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va maguku ti kpörö gba we?
english: Is he not going to fear the snake?

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va sogo ni we?
english: Is she not going to hate him?

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va riki ni gba we?
english: Is Ngande not going to surprise him?

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va dovee kurru we?
english: Is he not going to seem calm?

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va yele tamma gba we?
english: Is the girl not going to tie the shoe?

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va di kalla we?
english: Is he not going to cut the pot?

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va tele njokoji gba we?
english: Am I not going to pull the door?

balanda: Danda willa tiyai va turu songo we?
english: Are we not going to push the box?

balanda: Wilii ma tiyai va soko tamma gba we?
english: Is the girl not going to wash the shoe?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va kuru kavokau we?
english: Am I not going to hide the beads?

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va ngö tiyi gba we?
english: Is Ngande not going to build a house?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va suru kavoso we?
english: Am I not going to create words?

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va giri kavoso gba we?
english: Is she not going to change the words?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va kara njokoji we?
english: Am I not going to turn the door?

balanda: Danda ma tiyai va toko villi gba we?
english: Are we not going to add money?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va kefo Balanda we?
english: Am I not going to describe Balanda?

balanda: Ndi ma tiyai va konu nvesani gba we?
english: Are they not going to help the poor?

balanda: Ngande willa tiyai va ndugu mira we?
english: Is Ngande not going to initiate the project?

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va maforo mira gba we?
english: Am I not going to contribute to the project?

balanda: Wilii willa tiyai va sarwa kumere we?
english: Is the girl not going to separate trash?

balanda: Danda ma tiyai va kiri tidina gba we?
english: Are we not going to uphold the law?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va duru ngo we?
english: Am I not going to want water?

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va ze villi gba we?
english: Is she not going to give money?

balanda: Ne willa tiyai va dhe villi we?
english: Am I not going to find money?

balanda: Uku ma tiyai va mele vongu gba we?
english: Is Uku not going to try the cloth?

balanda: Ngande willa tiyai va si ba we?
english: Is Ngande not going to leave home?

balanda: Ne ma tiyai va lu Wau gba we?
english: Am I not going to arrive in Wau?

balanda: Ni willa tiyai va fagi mva we?
english: Is he not going to sharpen the knife?

balanda: Ngande ma tiyai va dewe kakpodu gba we?
english: Is Ngande not going to imitate adults?

balanda: Danda willa tiyai va bita mira we?
english: Are we not going to start the project?

balanda: Ni ma tiyai va teta gba we?
english: Is he not going to fall?
